entity.name: mhtc_road_name
entity.query: WITH index_base AS ( SELECT 'mhtc_road_name'::text AS subclass, id AS id_in_class, 'id' AS id_name, 'int:n' AS id_type, coalesce("RoadName", '') || ', ' || coalesce("Town", '') AS displaytext, coalesce("RoadName", '') || ' ' || coalesce("Locality", '') || ' ' || coalesce("Town", '') AS search_part_1, geom AS geom FROM local_authority."StreetGazetteerRecords" ) SELECT (array_to_json(array_append(ARRAY[subclass::text], id_in_class::text)))::text AS id, displaytext AS display, search_part_1 AS search_1_stem, search_part_1 AS sort, subclass AS facet, 'mhtc' AS tenant, (array_to_json(array_append(ARRAY[id_name::text], id_type::text)))::text AS idfield_meta, (st_asgeojson(st_envelope(geom), 0, 1)::json -> 'bbox')::text AS bbox, st_srid(geom) as srid FROM index_base
